  assert_equals: expected 10 but got 1

  assert_equals: expected 1 but got 0

  assert_equals: expected 2 but got 0

  assert_equals: expected 8 but got 10

  assert_equals: expected 3.14 but got 0

  assert_equals: max expected 10 but got 1
